title: agropyron glaucum subsp. latronum
intro: Agropyron glaucum subsp. latronum, also known as wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of wheat grass include reducing the risk of chronic diseases, improving immune function, and promoting overall well-being. Wheat grass can be prepared as a juice, tea, or powder, and is often used in herbal supplements and dietary products.
